Cribl Stream 4.0 Released

March 15, 2026

Cribl has released Stream 4.0 with significant performance improvements and new features for data routing and reduction. This release introduces adaptive sampling, improved Edge connectivity, and native support for new data sources including Kubernetes pod logs and AWS CloudTrail. The update is available to all Cribl Cloud customers immediately and to self-hosted customers via the standard upgrade path.
